commentaries.author: Ambrose of Milan
commentaries.content: Turn to us, O peaceful soul, that you may show your glory to your sisters and that they may begin to console themselves with the security of your repose and happiness. Turn to us once only, that we may see you, and turn again and hasten with all speed to that great Jerusalem, the city of the saints. Or indeed, since Christ says this to the pious soul, he commands it to turn for a little while, that its glory and its future repose with the saints may be manifest to us, and then he commands it to hasten to the company of the saints on high.

commentaries.author: Aquinas Study Bible
commentaries.content:
these are thw words of the Church to the Jews, because for a long time they were imprisioned in a discordant religion. (St. Bede)
Shunamite: the word means 'made captive.' (Alcuin)

methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
